description_long: This object consists of two axes with robust, straight wooden handles and metallic heads, joined together by a red cord looped through holes at the end of each handle. The handles are a medium brown color, showing signs of wear and use, and are rectangular in cross-section. The axe heads are metallic gray, each featuring a pointed pick on one side and a flat hammer or chisel-like surface on the other, suggesting a dual-purpose design for both cutting and prying. The metal heads are securely mounted to the handles, with visible bolts or rivets reinforcing the connection. The red cord provides a convenient carrying or hanging option, and the overall construction appears sturdy and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty urban or construction tasks.
description: A pair of rugged axes with wooden handles and metallic heads, joined by a red cord. Each axe features a pointed pick and a flat hammer end, designed for versatile urban use.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing both axes crossed, highlighting the red cord and the dual-sided metallic heads.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the handles and the profile of the axe heads, with the red cord visible at the ends.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the handles and the attachment points of the metal heads.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the straight alignment of the handles and the metallic heads' geometry.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handles, rectangular cross-section, medium brown, with visible wear and a red cord loop at the end.
attribute_blade_design: Dual-sided metallic head with a pointed pick on one side and a flat hammer or chisel on the other; robust and utilitarian.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged and riveted mounting with visible bolts securing the metal head to the wooden handle.
